Crabapple trees on the corner of Lloyd and Arlington Av. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.

I'm not entirely sure if these are edible. Small green pears. Squirrels eat them. They hang out over the fence; please don't enter the back garden. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-September.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
